# Source of truth for branch-protection required status checks.
# Each line is a job `name:` from .github/workflows/*.yml that must pass
# before a PR can merge. The `required-checks alignment (drift)` job in
# harness.yml fails if a line here does not map to a real workflow job
# (catches the silent block where protection waits for a renamed/removed
# check forever).
#
# To enforce on the GitHub side, mirror this list via:
#   gh api -X PUT repos/<owner>/<repo>/branches/main/protection ...
# (see docs/MERGE_POLICY.md if/when added).
#
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.

check
validate-commits
